title: galium divaricatum var. microspermum
intro: Galium divaricatum var. microspermum, also known as small-fruited bedstraw, is a variety of the Galium divaricatum plant, a flowering plant in the family Rubiaceae. This plant is known for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiseptic actions, making it useful in treating various health issues. The health benefits of Galium divaricatum var. microspermum include soothing sore throats, reducing inflammation, and aiding in wound healing, as well as being used as a natural remedy for digestive issues and menstrual cramps. In herbal preparations, the plant is typically used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed to reap its medicinal benefits.
